mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, email, phone, user_type, employee_number, manager_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{userType}, #{employeeNumber}, #{managerId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} AND deleted = 0 AND user_type = 'CUSTOMER'
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
